Parameter Phase Transition

📈 Efficient Frontier Analysis

The red line is your Pareto Front. Click any point to view its specific parameters.

🗺️ Parameter Stability Heatmap

Find large, uniform blocks of color. These are regions where your portfolio performance is robust, meaning small changes in the ||(\lambda||) weights won't crash your strategy.

📉 Multi-K Constraint Convergence

Each color represents a different Target K.

🌑 Ruggedness:

Green Region is a well rugged region.
